Service Types
What We Offer

Comprehensive Home Care Services

From daily assistance to critical care — skilled nurses and caregivers at your home.

🧑‍⚕️
Caretaker Service

Semi-qualified caregivers assist with daily activities — bathing, feeding, mobility, and personal hygiene for patients requiring continuous support.

💊
Basic Nursing Care

Vital monitoring, insulin administration, IM injections, and oxygen management — essential nursing care delivered at home.

🏥
Advanced Nursing Care

Ryle's tube management, catheterization, IV therapy, wound dressing, oxygen therapy — for complex nursing needs.

🫀
Specialised Critical Care

BiPAP/CPAP, central line care, PEG tube, tracheostomy, ventilator management and neonatal/baby care by expert nurses.

🧪
Lab Services at Home

Blood collection, investigations, reports delivered digitally. Senior care packages include comprehensive lab panels.

👴
Senior Care Packages

Holistic packages combining lab investigations, physician consultation, physiotherapy, and dedicated caregiver support for elderly patients.

🧘
Physiotherapy at Home

Certified physiotherapists visit your home for post-surgery rehab, stroke recovery, orthopaedic, neuro and sports injury rehabilitation — personalised sessions, zero travel.

💊
Medication Delivery at Home

Prescribed medicines, consumables and medical supplies delivered to your doorstep — fast, reliable, and coordinated with your care team for seamless treatment continuity.

Nursing Packages

Choose Your Care Plan

Flexible packages designed for every level of medical need — from basic vitals to full critical care.

🩺
Basic Package
Essential daily nursing care
  • Vitals monitoring (BP, Temp, SpO2, Pulse)
  • Insulin administration
  • IM / SC injections
  • Oxygen administration
  • Medication reminders
  • Daily nursing report
MOST POPULAR
🏥
Advanced Package
Complex nursing & procedure care
  • All Basic Package services
  • Ryle's tube insertion & management
  • Urinary catheter care
  • IV cannulation & infusion therapy
  • Advanced wound dressing
  • Oxygen therapy management
  • Nasogastric feeding
🫀
Specialised Package
Critical & intensive home care
  • BiPAP / CPAP management
  • Central line care & dressing
  • PEG tube feeding & care
  • Tracheostomy care
  • Ventilator management
  • Critical care nursing
  • Baby & neonatal nursing
🥈
Silver Senior Care
Essential elderly support
  • Daily vitals & health monitoring
  • Medication management
  • Personal hygiene assistance
  • Mobility & fall prevention
  • Monthly lab investigation package
  • Physician teleconsultation
RECOMMENDED
🥇
Gold Senior Care
All-inclusive care with dedicated caretaker
  • All Silver Package services
  • Dedicated caretaker for daily activities
  • Personal bathing & feeding assistance
  • Comprehensive lab investigations
  • Home physician visit (monthly)
  • Physiotherapy sessions at home
  • Nutritional counselling
  • Family health update reports
👶
Newborn Care
Expert neonatal nursing
  • Newborn vitals monitoring
  • Cord & skin care
  • Feeding support & guidance
  • Jaundice assessment
  • Parent education & training
  • Paediatrician tie-up visits
POPULAR
🤱
Mother & Baby Care
Postnatal comprehensive care
  • Post-delivery mother care
  • Newborn nursing support
  • Breastfeeding guidance
  • Wound & episiotomy dressing
  • BP & blood sugar monitoring
  • Emotional wellness support
🏥
NICU Step-Down Care
For high-risk neonates at home
  • SpO2 & cardiac monitoring
  • Nasogastric tube feeding
  • Phototherapy support
  • Oxygen therapy management
  • CPAP support care
  • Daily paediatric teleconsult
🦴
Ortho Rehab
Post-surgery & joint recovery
  • Post knee / hip replacement therapy
  • Fracture & sports injury rehab
  • Gait training & balance exercises
  • Manual therapy & mobilisation
  • Pain management techniques
  • Home exercise plan provided
MOST POPULAR
🧠
Neuro Rehab
Stroke, paralysis & brain injury recovery
  • Post-stroke physiotherapy
  • Hemiplegia & paraplegia rehab
  • Spasticity management
  • Speech & swallowing support coordination
  • Functional mobility retraining
  • Caregiver training & home adaptations
  • Progress tracking & doctor liaison
🫁
Pulmonary Rehab
Breathing & respiratory recovery
  • Post-COVID & COPD rehabilitation
  • Chest physiotherapy & percussion
  • Breathing exercises & Pursed lip training
  • Incentive spirometry sessions
  • Postural drainage techniques
  • Oxygen weaning support
At-Home Procedures

Medical Procedures Without Leaving Homeமருத்துவ சிகிச்சை முறைகள் வீட்டை விட்டு செல்லாமல்

Trained nurses and technicians perform clinical procedures at your doorstep — safely and hygienically.

WHAT WE DO
    📌 Note
    Tube & Line Procedures
    Ryle's Tube Insertion ℹ Urinary Catheter Insertion ℹ IV Cannulation ℹ Central Line Dressing ℹ PEG Tube Care ℹ Tracheostomy Care ℹ
    Wound & Dressing
    Wound Dressing ℹ Suture Removal ℹ Pressure Ulcer Care ℹ Diabetic Foot Care ℹ Post-Op Wound Care ℹ
    Injections & Infusions
    IV Infusion Therapy ℹ IM / SC Injections ℹ Insulin Administration ℹ
    Respiratory Care
    Oxygen Therapy ℹ Nebulization ℹ BiPAP / CPAP Setup ℹ Suction Procedure ℹ

    Need an Urgent Procedure?

    Our trained nurses can be at your home within hours for any clinical procedure. Available 24/7 — no hospital visit needed.

    Why Choose Us

    Healthcare Built on Trust & Excellence

    Jose Home Health Care brings clinical precision and genuine compassion together — every time, every visit.

    🎓
    Qualified Nurses
    GNM / BSc trained nurses with specialised ICU and critical care experience deployed to your home.
    🕐
    24/7 Availability
    Round-the-clock support — day shifts, night duty, emergency response, and on-call nursing available.
    🛡️
    Safe & Sterile
    All procedures follow strict aseptic protocols. Single-use equipment ensures complete safety and hygiene.
    📊
    Health Reports
    Daily nursing notes, vitals charts and progress reports shared digitally with family and physicians.
    💬
    Family Coordination
    We keep your family updated and work closely with your treating doctors for coordinated care.
    🏠
    Comfort of Home
    Recover faster in familiar surroundings with personalised attention — no hospital stress or infections.
    At Your Door

    Doctor Visits & Lab Services at Home

    No queues, no travel — get expert medical consultations and laboratory investigations from the comfort of your home.

    👨‍⚕️
    Doctor Visit at Doorstep

    Experienced physicians visit your home for consultations, follow-ups, and acute illness management.

    • General physician home visits
    • Specialist teleconsultation tie-up
    • Prescription & treatment plan
    • Post-discharge follow-up
    • Physiotherapy at home
    • Palliative care consultation
    🧪
    Lab Investigations at Home

    Certified phlebotomists collect samples at home. Reports delivered digitally within hours.

    • Blood collection & CBC, LFT, RFT panels
    • Blood glucose & HbA1c monitoring
    • Urine & stool analysis
    • ECG at home
    • Thyroid, lipid & metabolic profiles
    • Culture & sensitivity tests

    Fill in your details and our care coordinator will reach out within 30 minutes.
